Project 07 - Marketplace Seller Performance BI

Marketplace Seller Performance Dashboard

Complete dashboard for Shopee/Lazada/Tiki-style marketplace operations. Metrics are calculated from Project 07 - Marketplace Seller Performance prepared seller-month, order item, ads, category, and platform tables.

Executive Cockpit

GMV Trend

Net seller GMV by month, filtered by platform and tier.

GMV by Platform

Marketplace mix for selected month.

Top Sellers

Highest GMV sellers with quality guardrails.

Bottom Sellers

Lowest performance score among active sellers.

GMV vs Cancellation

Bubble size = order item volume.

Seller GMV Pareto

Concentration curve across seller ranks.

GMV by Seller Tier

Commercial segment contribution.

Seller Leaderboard

Ranked seller performance for the selected filter.

Category Growth Quadrant

Current share vs month-over-month growth.

GMV vs Ads and Voucher

Demand generation spend pressure.

Opportunity Sellers

Good quality sellers with weak growth, suitable for exposure or campaign push.

Risk Trend

Cancellation and stockout pressure over time.

Cancellation Reasons

Selected month mix.

GMV at Risk

High-risk sellers by risk score and GMV exposure.

Action Queue

Prioritized seller follow-up list.
